games.title: The Strongest Battle Grounds
games.description:
MAIN FEATURES

• Trashcan Kill Farm
• Auto Get Emotes
• Auto Reset Streak
• Auto Farm Lowest Health
• Auto Give Kills
• Desync
• Hitbox Extender

FIGHTING

• Advanced Combat Automation
• Wall Combos + Everywhere Wall Combo
• Auto Whirlwind Dunk
• No Dash Cooldown

LOCAL TECH

• Pre-Made Tech Library
• M1 Reset Tech
• Orea Tech
• Tornado Tech
• Auto Kyoto Tech
• Supa Dash Tech
• Backdash (Mobile & PC)

AUTO TECHS

• Auto Tech
• Auto True Slam
• Auto Twisted Tech
• Insta Twisted Tech
• Auto Supa Stream
• Flowing + Grasp
• Upper + Grasp

LAG / PING

• Hide Trees / Walls / Grass / Benches
• Performance Mode

ANIMATIONS

• Custom Animation ID Input
• Animation TP Usage

TELEPORT PANEL

• TP to Dummy / Frozen Lock
• TP to Corners (1 / 2 / 3 / 4)
• TP to Middle of Map
• TP to Mountain / Prison
• TP to Atomic Slash Room
• TP to Atomic Base
• TP to Void / Smoke / Pixel

MOVESETS

• Goku
• Shiryu
• Gojo
• Mahito
• Toji
• Minos Prime
• Arcaura
• Yuji / Sukuna Yuji
• Cyber Psycho
• Trashcan Killer
• + More

FLING

• Select Player Fling
• Fling Aura
• Touch Fling
• Click Fling
• Loop Fling
• View Target / Orbit View
• Notify on Death
• Camera Aimlock
• Character Aimlock
• Custom Fling Power
• Fling All [Buggy]

EXTRAS

• ESP (Everyone / Death Counter / Ult Bar)
• Anti-AFK
• Anti Stun
• Anti Invisibility
• Speed (V Key Toggle)
• Jump Boost
• Server Hop / Rejoin / Reset
• Infinite Yield
• Dex Explorer
• Remote Spy
• Fly V3
